creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Birgmeier from comment #3)

Hi Martin,

Thanks for your report. Yes, I can confirm, that there were problems with building graphics/qgis on existing boxes in the last days. And you are right, after rebuilding all py* ports, QGIS builts again.

Probably, after an update of a python port, a rebuild of one of its dependencies is needed, but missing. I was not able to find out, which of the python ports was the culprit.
